hero_subtitle: Find, explore, and request access to humanitarian datasets — all in one place
intro_body: The Humanitarian Data Space helps researchers and humanitarian organizations discover datasets that are relevant to their work. Many valuable datasets exist across different data repositories, but finding and accessing them can be difficult. This platform brings them together.
step1_body: Add the URL of a data repository. The platform will automatically discover all datasets it contains.
step2_body: Browse, search, and filter the discovered datasets to find the ones that match your needs.
step3_body: Add datasets to your selection and compose a data access request, or run queries directly on available endpoints.
